name: Eilidh — 81, Glasgow, needs help day and night
note: The first fully Scottish story: her Attendance Allowance card signposts across the border, and Pension Age Disability Payment computes — higher rate, both conditions. Pension Credit still computes for her too (it is Great-Britain-wide), and getting the payment would add the severe-disability amount there.
checked: Rates and conditions against mygov.scot/pension-age-disability-payment and S.S.I. 2024/166 reg 5 (day/night, 26 weeks), 2026-07-12.
